---
title: ""
page-layout: full
classes: page-books
toc: false
---

```{=html}

<div class="page-wrapper">
  
  <h1 class="page-header">Books</h1>

  <div class="card-grid">

    <div class="card-custom">
      <img src="images/book1.jpg" class="card-img" alt="Machine Learning Book">
      <h3 class="card-title">Machine Learning Book</h3>
      <p class="card-text">A complete guide to ML using Python.</p>
    </div>

    <div class="card-custom">
      <img src="images/book1.jpg" class="card-img" alt="Book 2">
      <h3 class="card-title">Book 2</h3>
      <p class="card-text">Description</p>
    </div>

    <div class="card-custom">
      <img src="images/book1.jpg" class="card-img" alt="Book 3">
      <h3 class="card-title">Book 3</h3>
      <p class="card-text">Description</p>
    </div>

    <div class="card-custom">
      <img src="images/book1.jpg" class="card-img" alt="Book 4">
      <h3 class="card-title">Book 4</h3>
      <p class="card-text">Description</p>
    </div>

    <div class="card-custom">
      <img src="images/book1.jpg" class="card-img" alt="Book 5">
      <h3 class="card-title">Book 5</h3>
      <p class="card-text">Description</p>
    </div>

    <div class="card-custom">
      <img src="images/book1.jpg" class="card-img" alt="Book 6">
      <h3 class="card-title">Book 6</h3>
      <p class="card-text">Description</p>
    </div>

  </div>
  
</div>


```
**Book 4**
Description
:::

::: {.card-custom}
![](images/book1.jpg){.card-img}
**Book 5**
Description
:::

::: {.card-custom}
![](images/book1.jpg){.card-img}
**Book 6**
Description
:::

:::
